subcodes.first_line: The world hath been honored through the revelation of God, the Lord of all nations. Blessed is the learned one whom knowledge hath not veiled, and blessed is the sage whom the arts have not shut out [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تشرف العالم بظهور الله مالک الامم طوبی لعالم ما منعته العلوم و لعارف ما حجبته الفنون
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
